creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to amendlik from comment #16)
It would appear it does not work with Heimdal in FreeBSD (though FreeBSD heimdal does work with my MIT KRB5 1.20.1 KDC here). This suggests that FreeIPA is not fully compatible with Kerberos.

I can offer a suggestion to try. It will require a custom patch, installation of MIT KRB5 and pam_krb5. I don't know if this will work or not. Let me know and I will outline the suggestion.
